text.title: AI-Generated Layout Review Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for ai-generated-layout-review-checklist.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the mockup have AI provenance + research grounding + brand-token compliance?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — record attestation before any other check
BLOCK — find or generate grounding before approval
REQUEST_CHANGES — token reference or RFC required
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
